# Stratigraphic Traps

**Summary**: Traps formed by the geometry of rock layers rather than structural features.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-butt|Butt, 2023]] identified potential stratigraphic traps in distal settings.

## Scientific Context

- [[2023-butt|Butt, 2023]] Identifying potential hydrocarbon accumulation sites in distal settings.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2023-butt|Butt, 2023]] Inferred from lithofacies distribution.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Mudstone-dominated floodplain deposits (FA3) could facilitate the formation of stratigraphic traps for sandstones. ([[2023-butt|Butt, 2023, p. 110]])
